snippet.title: Oko: Vladimir LeposaviДҮ, ministar zbog ДҚije se izjave o Srebrenici drma Vlada Crna Gore
snippet.description:
Ko ДҮe politiДҚki preЕҫiveti: premijer KrivokapiДҮ ili ministar LeposaviДҮ i postoji li opcija da ponovo zajedno rade

Kada je izabrana vlada Zdravka KrivokapiДҮa za ministra pravde Vladimira LeposaviДҮa govorilo se da je blizak Mitropoliji crnogorsko-primorskoj. Citirali su njegovu biografiju, a u njoj stoji da je bio jedan od najboljih studenata beogradskog Pravnog fakulteta, da je bio stipendista Fondacije Robert Е uman, dobitnik Fulbrajtove nagrade, doktor prava.

Ipak poslednjih 15-ak dana o njemu se govori u drugaДҚijem kontekstu, deo politiДҚke elite u Podgorici zove ga negatorom genocida u Srebrenici i ДҚovekom koji relativizuje zloДҚine. Drugi deo elite ga brani, smatra da je politiДҚki stradao zbog verbalnog delikta. U mnogim crnogorskim gradovima ljudi su izaЕЎli na ulice kada je Zdravko KrivokapiДҮ pokrenuo proces njegove smene. I sada je vlada Zdravka KrivokapiДҮa u najveДҮoj krizi, pitanje je ko ДҮe politiДҚki preЕҫiveti - LeposaviДҮ ili KrivokapiДҮ. Е ta je taДҚno LeposaviДҮ rekao na sednici SkupЕЎtine Crne Gore 26. marta, ЕЎta misli o Srebrenici, ЕЎta o HaЕЎkom tribunalu i da li ДҮe podneti ostavku.

Ekskluzivno za Oko govori ministar pravde i ljudskih i manjinskih prava u Vladi Crne Gore Vladimir LeposaviДҮ. S njim razgovara Stevan KostiДҮ.

Label and copyright: RTS

snippet.title: Dog interrupts live weather report in Moscow borrowing journalist's microphone
snippet.description:
A correspondent's live weather report was interrupted by a dog who snatched her microphone and ran off with it. Nadezhda Serezhkina, who works for the Russian-language broadcaster Mir TV, could then be seen running after the dog who still had the colourful microphone in its mouth. The dog, and the damaged microphone, later joined Serezhkina for the end of her live broadcast

snippet.title: KrivokapiДҮ u verbalnom sukobu sa ДҚelnicima DF-a
snippet.description:
Premijer Crne Gore Zdravko KrivokapiДҮ napustio je sinoДҮnji sastanak sa predstavnicima vladajuДҮe veДҮine nakon verbalnog sukoba sa ДҚelnicima Demokratskog fronta.

Iz DF-a je saopЕЎteno da na sastanku nije bilo pomaka u odnosu na krizu vlade, izazvanu odlukom KrivokapiДҮa da traЕҫi razrjeЕЎenje ministra pravde Vladimira LeposaviДҮa zbog izjave da ДҮe priznati genocid u Srebrenici tek kada se nedvosmisleno utvrdi. Front je ranije najavio da neДҮe glasati za smjenu LeposaviДҮa, a na sastanku su, kako su rekli, traЕҫili da se premijer pomiri sa ministrom.

Premijer Zdravko KrivokapiДҮ poruДҚio je da je napustio sastanak jer ne dozvoljava podmetanje i neistine. Kako je napisao na Twitteru - dosta je bilo laЕҫi radi sticanja politiДҚkih poena.

#CrnaGora

snippet.title: GUH - POCEO OD NULE (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/guhsajan/
Spotify: uskoro...
Deezer: uskoro...

Muzika i Tekst: GUH
AranЕҫman: @jonezr
Mix i Master: @bogi_batina

Kamera: @jovanradoviic
Directed by: GUH, @jovanradoviic
Video Edit & Post Production: @jovanradoviic
https://www.instagram.com/jovanradoviicвҖӢвҖӢ

Tekst/Lyrics:

Poceo od nule vidi gde sam tada bio
Igrao sam igru ko da bila je kazino
Kido
Zajedno smo jaki ko Vegito
Preuzimam scenu nece me spreciti niko  (x2)

Al put je dug znaj da cimo sam se kao nikad pre
Nisam znao nista al u glavi imao sam sve
Laptop, daska , krevet, kamera ja jurim svoje sne
To sam ja GUH SAJAN koji ne odustaje

Bio slep
Nisam znao ko pravi drugar je
Mnogo njih se pravi da to jesu, a mnogi su fejk
Svako gleda svoju korist i to gadi mi se eeej
Moram nositi se stime moram paziti na sve

Ja sam gladan uspeha i idem sada ka svom snu
Sujeta ih jede i to ne mogu da prikriju
Maska dole, Maska gore lica manjaju vam se
Polecem polecem, gore zvezde zovu me

Najgore je to sto ljude vidis samo kao broj
Neki gledaju te i pisu ti kako nisi svoj
Vremenom tek vide kolko to pogresna je vest
JEDAN JE GUH SAJAN I NE POSTOJI COPY PASTE

Igrao sam igru ko da bila je kazino
Kido
Zajedno smo jaki ko Vegito
Preuzimam scenu nece me spreciti niko  (x2)

snippet.title: Ursula Von der Leyen snubbed in chair gaffe at EU-ErdoДҹan talks
snippet.description:
The president of the European commission, Ursula von der Leyen, was momentarily left without a seat as she met with the European council president, Charles Michel and Turkish president, Recep Tayyip ErdoДҹan, in Ankara on Tuesday - triggering an avalanche of criticism.

Subscribe to Guardian News on YouTube в–ә http://bit.ly/guardianwiressub

With only two chairs available, Von der Leyen, the sole attending female leader, sat on the sofa as ErdoДҹan and Michel sat on the chairs. вҖңEhm,вҖқ she muttered, with a small gesticulation directed at the occupied seats. Michel, who had appeared to make a bee-line for the top spot next to ErdoДҹan as the party entered, offered little evidence of regret.

A spokesperson for Von der Leyen said: "The important thing is that the president should have been seated in exactly the same manner as the President of the European Council and the Turkish President. But ... she decided to proceed nevertheless prioritising substance over protocol."

The awkward scene was played out ahead of a three-hour meeting with ErdoДҹan where one of the issues raised by the EU leaders was womenвҖҷs rights in light of TurkeyвҖҷs withdrawal from a convention on gender-based violence.

The Guardian publishes independent journalism, made possible by supporters. Contribute to The Guardian today в–ә https://bit.ly/3uhA7zg

Website в–ә https://www.theguardian.com
Facebook в–әhttps://www.facebook.com/theguardian

snippet.title: Javor - Crvena zvezda 1:5, highlights
snippet.description:
Javor - Crvena zvezda 1:5 (1:2)

Stadion: вҖһGradski stadion u IvanjiciвҖң.

Sudija: Lazar LukiДҮ.

00:09 1:0 LukoviДҮ u 4. minutu
00:42 1:1 Katai u 8. minutu
01:48 1:2 Katai u 31. minutu
03:03 1:3 MilunoviДҮ u 65. minutu
03:52 1:4 Ben u 72. minutu
04:47 1:5 Falko u 82. minutu

Strelci: LukoviДҮ u 4. minutu za Javor, a Katai u 8. i 31, MilunoviДҮ u 65, Ben u 72. i Falko u 82. minutu za Crvenu zvezdu.

ЕҪuti kartoni: Dukure, RuЕЎeviДҮ (Javor), Kanga, KrstoviДҮ, Borjan (Crvena zvezda).

Javor: VelimiroviДҮ, JevtiДҮ, OstojiДҮ, PaviЕЎiДҮ, JevremoviДҮ, MariДҚiДҮ(od 67. RuЕЎeviДҮ), Dukure, NikoliДҮ(od 77. Vico), Е ДҮepanoviДҮ(od 77. BalabanoviДҮ), IliДҮ, LukoviДҮ(od 77. Zvekanov).

Rezerve: BabiДҮ, Vico, RuЕЎeviДҮ, BalabanoviДҮ, JovanoviДҮ, BasariДҮ, Zvekanov, StojanoviДҮ, Tanko, JeliДҮ.

Crvena zvezda: Borjan, GajiДҮ, Pankov, MilunoviДҮ(od 80. GobeljiДҮ), RodiДҮ, PetroviДҮ, Kanga, IvaniДҮ(od 80. VukanoviДҮ), Ben(od 75. Falko), Katai(od 71. SrniДҮ), KrstoviДҮ(od 71. Pavkov).

Rezerve: PopoviДҮ, GobeljiДҮ, Degenek, Sanogo, NikoliДҮ, Falko, SrniДҮ, GavriДҮ, VukanoviДҮ, Pavkov.

snippet.title: NJIH DVE SVAKI DAN PEЕ KE PREДҗU 15km ZAJEDNO:TeЕЎka Еҫivotna priДҚa devojДҚice Milice i njenog psa Lare
snippet.description:
Nova epizoda serijala вҖһ300 ДҚudaвҖң donela je zanimljive priДҚe o ljubavi i lepoti. Ne kaЕҫu uzalud da je pas najbolji ДҚovekov prijatelj. Ta ljubav je neizmerna, jaka i bezuslovna, a vernost psa ne moЕҫe da se meri ni sa ДҚim.  U KurЕЎumlijskom planinskom selu Konjuva, svakoga jutra pre zore, Milica Rackov (15) kreДҮe peЕЎke put ЕЎkole u susedno selo Barbatovac. Treba peЕЎaДҚiti po mrazu, snegu ili kiЕЎi do autobuske stanice, udaljene nekoliko kilometara od kuДҮe. Autobusom stiЕҫe do ЕЎkole udaljene oko 15 kilometara. Kada se desi da autobusa nema, Milica prepeЕЎaДҚi u oba smera ukupno 30 kilometara. Sve vreme je verno prati i satima ДҚeka keruЕЎa Lara.

#Еҫivotna priДҚa #kurir #kurirTelevizija

snippet.title: The Truth About my Son
snippet.description:

Livestream link (April 30th- MARK YOUR CALENDAR NOW!)- https://youtu.be/5J3peD8LZ5o
Learn more about the charity NEXT for Autism here- https://www.nextforautism.org/current-events/color-the-spectrum/

Andy Samberg, Adam Sandler, Casey Neistat, Chris Rock, Conan o'brien, Miranda Sings, iJustine, Jack Black, Jacksepticeye, John Oliver, Jon Stewart, Karl Jacobs, Marques Brownlee, Maya Rudolph, Mark Hamill, Merrell Twins, MrBeast, Paul Rudd, Rhett & Link, Sarah Silverman, Stephen Colbert, Terry Crews, Vsauce, Zach Galifianakis, Zach King plus a few more surprises!

snippet.title: Novi serijal: SreД‘ujem Еҫenin auto! Evo koji je kupila!
snippet.description:
Link sa 30% popusta pri proveri istorije automobila na CarVerticalu: 
https://www.carvertical.com/rs/landing/v3?utm_source=infl&a=autoanaliza&b=0d7540bc&voucher=analizaauto

snippet.title: РҡРҫСҲР°СҖРәР°СҲ РјР°РҪРёРҝСғР»РёСҲРө Р”РёР°РҪРҫРј | РҡРҫ СӣРө РёСӣРё Сғ СҒРҝРҫСҖСӮСҒРәРё РәР°РјРҝ?
snippet.description:
Р”РёР°РҪР° Рё СҡРөРҪ СӮРёРј РҪР°РІРёСҳР°СҮРёСҶР° РҝСҖРёРәСғРҝСҷР°СҳСғ РҝРҫСӮРҝРёСҒРө Р·Р° РҫРҙР»Р°Р·Р°Рә Сғ СҒРҝРҫСҖСӮСҒРәРё РәР°РјРҝ СҒР° РҙСҖСғРіРёРј СҒРҝРҫСҖСӮСҒРәРёРј СӮРёРјРҫРІРёРјР°. РҹСҖРёРәСғРҝСҷРөРҪРё СҒСғ СҒРәРҫСҖРҫ СҒРІРё РҝРҫСӮРҝРёСҒРё, РҫСҒСӮР°Рҫ СҳРө РҝРҫСҒР»РөРҙСҡРё РҝРҫСӮРҝРёСҒ - РҝРҫСӮРҝРёСҒ РәРҫСҲР°СҖРәР°СҲР°! РҡРҫСҲР°СҖРәР°СҲ СҳРө РәР°СӮРөРіРҫСҖРёСҮРәРё РҝСҖРҫСӮРёРІ РҫРІРҫРі РҝСғСӮРҫРІР°СҡР°, Рё Р·РұРҫРі СӮРҫРіР°, СҒР°РҙР° РҪРёРәРҫ РҪРө РёРҙРө Сғ Р»РҫРіРҫСҖ. Р”РёСҳР°РҪР° СҳРө РҝРҫСҒСӮР°Рҫ РҝРҫСҒР»СғСҲР°РҪ РёРіСҖР°СҮРәР° Р·Р° РәРҫСҲР°СҖРәР°СҲР°? Р”Р° Р»Рё СҳРө РјРҫРіСғСӣРө РҙР° СӣРө СҒРІРө РәСҖРөРҪСғСӮРё РҝРҫ Р·Р»Сғ Р·РұРҫРі РәРҫСҲР°СҖРәР°СҲР°? РҹРҫРіР»РөРҙР°СҳСӮРө Сғ РҫРІРҫСҳ СҒРөСҖРёСҳРё!

РҹСҖРөСӮРҝР»Р°СӮРёСӮРө СҒРө РҪР° РәР°РҪР°Р»!рҹ‘©вҖҚрҹ‘©вҖҚрҹ‘ҰвҖҚрҹ‘Ұ

hr.title: KoЕЎarkaЕЎ manipulira Dianom | Tko ДҮe iДҮi u sportski kamp?
hr.description:

KoЕЎarkaЕЎ je kategoriДҚno protiv ovog putovanja, i zbog toga sada nitko ne ide u kamp. Diana je postala posluЕЎna igraДҚka za koЕЎarkaЕЎa? Je li moguДҮe da ДҮe sve krenuti po zlu zbog koЕЎarkaЕЎa? snippet.title: Na veДҚeri kod: Bojan VaskoviДҮ / sezona 2 / ep7
snippet.description:
SledeДҮi domaДҮin tima So koji ДҮe u svom domu ugostiti ekipu Biber je Bojan VaskoviДҮ, frontmen jednog od najpopularnijih bendova domaДҮe muziДҚke scene - "Lexington".
Ovaj roД‘eni Sarajlija otkriva kako je pred granatama bio prinuД‘en da napusti rodni grad i ЕЎta je sve proЕЎao dok se nije skuДҮio u prestonici. NesuД‘enom fudbaleru je omiljeni sport zaista najvaЕҫnija sporedna stvar na svetu i jedino oko ДҚega ume da se "zakaДҚi" sa svojom suprugom.
VideДҮete kako se Bojan snaЕЎao na pijaci a kako u kuhinji i zaЕЎto njegova lepЕЎa polovina kaЕҫe da je tu, prvenstveno, odliДҚan degustator.

Duhovit i ЕЎarmantan, Bojan se pokazao kao veseo, raspevan i zabavan domaДҮin Tijani DapДҚeviДҮ, Zorani PaviДҮ, Sanji VuДҚiДҮ, Borisu PingoviДҮu, Nigoru i Veljku KuzmanДҚeviДҮu koji je svojim komentarima zabavio i svoju ekipu i domaДҮine.

snippet.title: Camdaki KДұz 3. BГ¶lГјm FragmanДұ
snippet.description:
Camdaki KДұz 3. BГ¶lГјm FragmanДұ

Camdaki KДұz FragmanДұ yayДұnda! GГјlseren BudayДұcДұoДҹluвҖҷnun aynДұ isimli romanДұndan uyarlanan, gerГ§ek bir aЕҹk hikayesinin konu alДұndДұДҹДұ Camdaki KДұz, baЕҹarДұlДұ oyuncu kadrosuyla da gГ¶z dolduruyor. Nalan karakterini Burcu BiricikвҖҷin canlandДұrdДұДҹДұ Camdaki KДұzвҖҷda; Devrim Yakut, Feri Baycu GГјler, Feyyaz ЕһerifoДҹlu, Hamza YazДұcДұ, Hande Ataizi, Merve Polat, Nihal Menzil, Nur SГјrer, Selma ErgeГ§,  Еһerif Erol, Tamer Levent, TuДҹrul TГјlek yer alДұyor. Senaryosunu Seda AltaylДұ TurgutluвҖҷnun kaleme aldДұДҹДұ, yГ¶netmenliДҹini ise Nadim GГјГ§'Гјn ГјstlendiДҹi Camdaki KДұz 8 Nisan PerЕҹembe 20.00'de Kanal D'de baЕҹlДұyor!

Camdaki KДұz  PerЕҹembe 20.00'de Kanal D'de !

------------------

Camdaki KДұz Trailer is streaming! Adapted from Gulseren BudayiciogluвҖҷs novel of the same name, Camdaki KДұz is based on a true love story. Kanal DвҖҷs new drama has a phenomenal cast. Burcu Biricik is going to portray the character Nalan, and the other successful actors and actresses of the series are Devrim Yakut, Feri Baycu Guler, Feyyaz Serifoglu, Hamza Yazici, Hande Ataizi, Merve Polat, Nihal Menzil, Nur Surer, Selma Ergec, Serif Erol, Tamer Levent, Tugrul Tulek. Written by Seda Altayli Turgutlu, directed by Nadim Guc, Camdaki Kiz is going to premier on 8 April Thursday at 8 pm on Kanal D!

Camdaki Kiz premieres on 8 April Thursday at 8 pm on Kanal D!

Oyuncular:  Burcu Biricik, Devrim Yakut, Feyyez ЕһerifoДҹlu, Hamza YazДұcДұ, Hande Ataizi, Nur SГјrer, Selma ErgeГ§, Еһerif Erol, Tamer Levent, TuДҹrul TГјlek bulunuyor

snippet.title: IMPRESIVNO SA RR - LEA STANKOVIC : JAKO SAM TESKA I POVUCENA OSOBA!
snippet.description:
Od 16. marta, svakog utorka na mom yt kanalu u 19h gledacete novu epizodu IMPRESIVNO sa Ruzom Rupic. Ugosticu mnoge javne licnosti iz raznih sfera javnog zivota koje cete upoznati u potpuno drugacijem svetlu. Pricacemo o njihovim karijerama, pocecima, sta im je bilo najteze, a sta najlakse u njihovom putu i pevacemo! Pomoc cu imati od mog producenta Pavla Radulovica. Danas mi je u gostima Lea Stankovic! Kakav je bio njen pocetak na youtubeu, ko u poslu moze najvise da je iznervira i ko je Lea kada se ugase kamere, saznacete u danasnjoj epizodi.
Nadam se da ce vam se dopasti celokupan projekat, a mi se vidimo svakog utorka od 19h.

snippet.description:

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
LYRICS:
As the Covid 19 vaccine rolls out, 
big questions loom. 
First, can someone who's been vaccinated 
still spread the disease? 

Lockdown ko knockdown
Djogani is in the house
With a brand new sound
No money no, no business
Put your mask on 
and keep the distance
Lockdown nervous breakdown
Fucking virus is flying around
We gotta move, move
we have to dance
Reach for the stars
Idemo na Mars

Sedim kuДҮi cele noДҮi maskiran
Svetom vlada ДҚudna epidemija
ДҢekaj, hani, hani,
Daj molim te ne drami
Svuda piЕЎe LOCK DOWN,
VidiЕЎ na naslovnoj strani
A, ti bi, moja habibi,
Da te vodim u Dubai, a posle Karibi
Nemoj sada kada pukla je estrada,
Nema putovanja, nema Gucci, nema Prada

Santorini,
Masku skini, hajde ljubi me
Baci ДҚini, 
Da sve opet bude kao pre
Uzmi ruku pa me vodi
I pozovi muziku za sto
Da zajedno zoru ДҚekamo
Da me grliЕЎ hoДҮu jako
Kako ako si na metar-dva
Moja ljubav nije zarazna

Jo, jo, jo, jo...
Lockdown nervus breakdown
Fuckin virus is flyin around
We gotta move, move
We have to dance
Reach for the stars
Idemo na Mars

SluЕЎaj malo doktore na vestima
Е ta ДҮe dalje biti baЕЎ me zanima
ДҢekaj, hani, hani, da proД‘u ovi dani
Ludilo preti planeti,
Budimo kod mene sami
A ti bi, moja habibi,
Opet svuda po Evropi nastupe na bini
JoЕЎ samo malo, evo ja ti dajem reДҚ
PuniДҚemo opet Cirih, Dizeldorf i BeДҚ.
 
Ref.

Ma, nema stani-pani
Tu je Дҗole Дҗogani
Idemo na Mars, pun je gas, 
Samo masku stavi
Ritam te radi, radi
super je ЕЎto smo sami,
Ne moЕҫemo vani
Zato doД‘i meni, mami, mami

Ako ti je dosadno ti snimaj Tik Tok
Neka gleda sever, zapad, jug i istok
Sve dok imaЕЎ mene ne treba ti niko
Sa mnom si na sigurnom.
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Zahvaljujemo se:
рҹҺө Antonu
рҹҺө Marku D.
рҹҺө ЕҪiki P.
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

snippet.title: KuruluЕҹ Osman 54. BГ¶lГјm
snippet.description:
O, kГ¶mГјr karasДұ gГ¶zleriyle, gaza ve hГјrriyet ateЕҹini tutuЕҹturacaktДұ. 

AdДұ, ErtuДҹrul Gazi oДҹlu OsmanвҖҷdДұвҖҰ 

KaranlДұДҹДұn iГ§inde ona yol gГ¶steren вҖңaЕҹkвҖқ olduвҖҰ

Kan ve gГ¶zyaЕҹДұyla sulanan topraklarda, gГ¶k ekini gibi biГ§ilen; yedi gГ¶ДҹГј, yedi yeri, daДҹlarДұ, denizleri aЕҹacak bir milletin rГјyasДұnДұ вҖңaЕҹklaвҖқ gГ¶rdГј.

GГјcГјnГј kДұlДұcДұndan deДҹil, вҖңaЕҹktanвҖқ aldДұвҖҰ ZorbalДұДҹa adaletle; kГ¶leliДҹe hГјrriyetle direnen, tarihin gГ¶rdГјДҹГј en bГјyГјk imparatorluДҹa adДұnДұ вҖңaЕҹklaвҖқ verdi.

72 milleti kДұran bozuk dГјzene karЕҹДұ baЕҹkaldДұrДұ, mazlumlarДұn sessiz Г§ДұДҹlДұДҹДұna umut, KuruluЕҹвҖҷun adДұ olduвҖҰ

KuruluЕҹ OsmanвҖҰ 400 Г§adДұrlДұk bir obadan, вҖңilahi aЕҹklaвҖқ kurulan bir cihan imparatorluДҹuna yГјrГјyГјЕҹГјn hikayesi.

Abone Olmak iГ§in ; https://bit.ly/2t8pQdU

atv Resmi YouTube KanalДұna Abone Olmak Д°Г§in; https://goo.gl/dmrDLN

AdДұ, ErtuДҹrul Gazi oДҹlu OsmanвҖҷdДұвҖҰ 

KaranlДұДҹДұn iГ§inde ona yol gГ¶steren вҖңaЕҹkвҖқ olduвҖҰ

Kan ve gГ¶zyaЕҹДұyla sulanan topraklarda, gГ¶k ekini gibi biГ§ilen; yedi gГ¶ДҹГј, yedi yeri, daДҹlarДұ, denizleri aЕҹacak bir milletin rГјyasДұnДұ вҖңaЕҹklaвҖқ gГ¶rdГј.

GГјcГјnГј kДұlДұcДұndan deДҹil, вҖңaЕҹktanвҖқ aldДұвҖҰ ZorbalДұДҹa adaletle; kГ¶leliДҹe hГјrriyetle direnen, tarihin gГ¶rdГјДҹГј en bГјyГјk imparatorluДҹa adДұnДұ вҖңaЕҹklaвҖқ verdi.

72 milleti kДұran bozuk dГјzene karЕҹДұ baЕҹkaldДұrДұ, mazlumlarДұn sessiz Г§ДұДҹlДұДҹДұna umut, KuruluЕҹвҖҷun adДұ olduвҖҰ

KuruluЕҹ OsmanвҖҰ 400 Г§adДұrlДұk bir obadan, вҖңilahi aЕҹklaвҖқ kurulan bir cihan imparatorluДҹuna yГјrГјyГјЕҹГјn hikayesi.

snippet.description:

Dosije - Ljuba Zemunac 2. deo | PRVA
Sve epizode moЕҫete da pogledate ovde: https://bit.ly/Dosije

Nastavak priДҚe o Ljubi Zemuncu. 

Ekipa "Dosijea" priДҚa o vremenu ozbiljnih opasnih mangaЕЎa ДҚiji postupci se i dan danas prepriДҚavaju. Na ДҚelu ganga nalazio se jedan od najpoznatijih Еҫestokih momaka sa naЕЎih prostora, zaДҚetnik jugo mafije Ljubomir MagaЕЎ, zvani Ljuba Zemunac. Na sam pomen njegovog imena svi su strahovali. PraviДҚan, patriota pomalo preke naravi reЕЎavao je situacije u hodu. Za prijatelje anД‘eo ДҚuvar dok je za ove druge bio noДҮna mora, a gnev i jaДҚinu njegove pesnice neprijatelji su odliДҚno pamtili. ЕҪivotni put Ljubomira MagaЕЎa i druЕҫine koju je okupio oko sebe, moЕҫe se porediti sa scenama holivudskog filma. Od bezbriЕҫnih deДҚaka do ljudi sa poternica, od vila i luksuznih automobila do hladnih zatvorskih zidina, preko zlata i para do kovДҚega. SaznaДҮemo na koje sve skrivene i javne naДҚine je njegova ekipa operisala krimi krugovima i videti rekonstrukcije najbitnijih dogaД‘aja iz njegovog Еҫivota. ДҢuДҮemo i svedoДҚanstva onih koji su ga poznavali, i sve to u stilu najuzbudljivijih dokumentaristiДҚkih akcionih filmova.

snippet.title: Emanet 160. BГ¶lГјm | Legacy Episode 160
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KДұrДұmlДұ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherвҖҷs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewвҖҰ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleвҖҷs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KДұrДұmlДұ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KДұrДұmlДұ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts.

snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KДұrДұmlДұ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherвҖҷs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewвҖҰ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleвҖҷs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KДұrДұmlДұ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KДұrДұmlДұ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts.

snippet.title: Space Jam: A New Legacy | Official Trailer | HBO Max
snippet.description:
Welcome to the Jam! LeBron James, NBA champion and global icon, goes on an epic adventure alongside Bugs Bunny and his looney friends.
 
When LeBron and his young son Dom are trapped in a digital space by a rogue A.I., LeBron must get them home safe by leading Bugs, Lola Bunny and the whole gang of notoriously undisciplined Looney Tunes to victory over a powered-up roster of professional basketball stars as youвҖҷve never seen them before. ItвҖҷs Tunes versus Goons in the highest-stakes challenge of his life, that will redefine LeBronвҖҷs bond with his son and shine a light on the power of being yourself.
 
Available in theaters and to stream on HBO Max on July 16, in the US only, for 31 days from theatrical release, at no extra cost to subscribers.

Subscribe: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxYouTube

Be the first to know more:
HBO Max: https://hbom.ax/YT

snippet.description:
Iako su tradicionalno svekrve i snaje rivali u borbi za srce sina i muЕҫa, one ДҮe se u novom kulinarskom takmiДҚenju zajedno boriti za porodiДҚnu vikendicu i druge vredne nagrade. Svake nedelje na Kurir televiziji nas oДҚekuje 5 svekrva sa svojim kuvarskim iskustvom, 5 snaja u Еҫelji da se dokaЕҫu i 5 mladoЕҫenja koji ДҮe odluДҚivati o tome ko pobeД‘uje!
